title: Forester - Timber [extension]
description: Guardian of the forest, protects the forest from being cut down
body:
Stop Overlogging with Nature’s Guardian!

**Forester** is a lightweight and immersive Minecraft plugin that adds consequences for cutting down too many trees too quickly.  
When a player chops more than **50 logs in 60 seconds**, a **Forester NPC** appears to stop the destruction!  
Perfect for survival or RPG servers looking to bring more realism and balance.

***

**You need to install the main [Timber](https://modrinth.com/plugin/treetimber) plugin for it to work correctly**

## ⚙️ Features

*   ⏱️ **Timed Log Tracking**  
    Tracks how many logs a player breaks in a given time frame.
    
*   🌳 **Forester NPC Spawning**  
    If the player breaks more than **50 logs within 60 seconds**, the Forester spawns.
    
*   🔁 **Auto Reset**  
    If the threshold isn't reached within the set time, the counter resets automatically.
    
*   🧍 **Spawn Cooldown**  
    The Forester can only spawn once every **5 minutes** per player to avoid abuse.
    
*   🛠️ **Fully Configurable**  
    All limits and cooldowns are easily adjustable in the config file.
    

***
